input.query: How many open requisitions do we have?

description: Pipeline metrics query — should call query_pipeline_metrics and return open req count with metric source

input.query: Show me candidates with React experience

description: Candidate skill search — should call search_candidates_db with skills filter and return matching candidates

input.query: What's our average time-to-hire this quarter?

description: Analytics query — should call query_pipeline_metrics with time range and return avg time-to-hire

input.query: Who are the top candidates for the Senior Engineer role?

description: Semantic search + DB query — should use both search tools to find and rank candidates for the role

input.query: What should I focus on today?

description: Prioritized action suggestions — should analyze pipeline state and suggest prioritized next actions

input.query: How many candidates are in the phone screen stage?

description: Stage-specific count query

input.query: Compare the performance of our sourcing channels

description: Sourcing channel comparison — needs pipeline metrics

input.query: Who interviewed the most candidates this month?

description: Interviewer activity query

input.query: Draft a rejection email for candidate John Doe

description: Email drafting — should look up candidate first

input.query: What are the most common reasons candidates decline our offers?

description: Offer decline reasons analysis

description: Language-based candidate search

input.query: Schedule a debrief for the last round of interviews

description: Action suggestion — debrief scheduling
